title: Properties of i
text: Recall $$i^1=i$$, $$i^2=-1$$, $$i^3=-i$$, $$i^4=1$$. This repeats every four powers, i.e. $$i^5=i$$, and so on.

title: Simplifying the First Term
text: $$i^{-3}=\frac{1}{i^3}$$. Use the first hint to simplify $$i^3$$. Then, multiply the numerator and denominator by i to eliminate i from the denominator.

title: Simplifying the Second Term
text: Similarly, use the first hint on $$5i^7$$.

title: Getting the Full Equation
text: Lastly, add the simplified versions of $$i^{-3}$$ and $$5i^7$$.
